rationale: Russian strikes killing 11 in Kyiv and destroying a historic cathedral are a continuation of the ongoing war pattern, but the scale and symbolic destruction of a cathedral is a mild qualitative uptick worth noting for Poland's eastern security awareness. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill 11 and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
top_events.summary: Deadly Russian strikes on Kyiv including destruction of a historic cathedral represent a continuation of the war but with symbolic escalation. For Poland, this reinforces eastern border security concerns without a direct new threat.

top_events.title: Trump says ships 'starting to move' through Strait of Hormuz
top_events.summary: Rhetoric from Trump about Hormuz reopening — no confirmed new action beyond the existing deal. Continued oil price relief is mildly positive for Polish energy costs but this is continuation.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for 'espionage activities'
top_events.summary: Another US academic detained by China — continuation of a pattern with no direct impact on Polish daily life.
